title: Gangs
questions: Have you ever belonged to a gang?

Were there any good gangs at your school?

What kinds of gangs are there in your country?
What kind of organized crime are gangs involved in your country?

Do gangs in your country form on the basis of colour, religion and race?
What is a gang?
Do different gangs in your country fight each other?
Do you think gangs exist in all countries?
Are the street gangs in your country armed?

How would you describe the profile of an average gang member?
